candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt and candidate shortlist item; excludes leases.
A current-liabilities-section borrowings line likely represents current borrowings, but duplicate 'Borrowings' rows make it ambiguous which exact one is the clean total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit non-lease current maturities debt line. Manual review because current-liabilities section also contains duplicated 'Borrowings' rows, creating ambiguity about whether a broader current debt total exists and should replace this line.

candidates.why: Exact match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident exact IFRS-style current tax payable line.

candidates.why: Exact reported PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE measure.
